title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still haven't received the reset link.

title: Payment Failure - Subscription Renewal
description: The customer reported that their annual subscription failed to renew even though the credit card information is correct.

title: UI Bug - Dashboard Not Loading
description: After the latest update, the main analytics dashboard is showing a blank white screen for enterprise users.

title: Feature Request - Dark Mode Support
description: Customer is requesting a native dark mode for the mobile application to reduce eye strain during night usage.

title: Refund Request - Duplicate Charge
description: User was charged twice for the monthly 'Pro' plan. Requesting an immediate refund for the second transaction.

title: Account Deletion Request
description: Customer wants to permanently delete their account and all associated data due to privacy concerns.

title: API Integration Error - Webhooks
description: Developer reporting that the POST webhooks are returning a 500 error code for the last 3 hours.

title: Profile Update Issue
description: Unable to change profile picture. Every time the user uploads an image, the server returns an 'Invalid File Type' error.

title: Slow Performance - Mobile App
description: Reporting significant lag and high battery consumption on the Android version of the app (v2.4.1).

title: Incorrect Shipping Address
description: Customer accidentally provided the wrong street number for their hardware order and needs to update it before shipping.
